result.text:
My wife and I have some heartbreaking news to share: we lost our baby at 21 weeks 

We’re devastated, and I’ll likely quieter while we take time to grieve and heal. 

You may see me lurking when I'm looking for a distraction but family comes first

Thank you all for for the kindness you’ve shown us

result.text:
Oh shit, I am so sorry for your loss.
I couldn't imagine how I would feel if I lost either of my twins.

I know you don't know me, but if there is anything I can do, let me know. This grieving process will likely be hard, but it is so important that you both face it together. Taking the time you need is the right call here.

All the love in the world to you
